📊 Superstore Sales — EDA Report

👩‍💻 Author: Krupa Patel

💰 Total Sales

📈 Total Profit
9,994
🛒 Total Orders

👥 Unique Customers
12.5%
📉 Avg Profit Margin
15.6%
🏷️ Avg Discount Given

💡 Key Business Insights

  • 🏆 West region leads with the highest total sales among all 4 regions.
  • 📉 Tables & Bookcases are loss-making sub-categories despite high sales volume.
  • 🏷️ Discounts above 30% consistently result in negative profit.
  • 📅 Q4 (Oct–Dec) shows peak sales every year — strong seasonal pattern.
  • 💻 Technology is the most profitable category overall.
  • 👥 Consumer segment drives the highest number of orders (51%).
  • 🚚 Standard Class is the most preferred shipping mode (60%+ orders).
